Spring Data Elasticsearch
  1. org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.rest_client

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.rest_client

Packages that use org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.rest_client
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.rest_client
This package contains related to the old (up to Elasticsearch 9) RestClient.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.rest_client used by org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.rest_client
    Class
    Description
    RestClients.ElasticsearchHttpClientConfigurationCallback
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    ClientConfiguration.ClientConfigurationCallback to configure the Elasticsearch RestClient's Http client with a HttpAsyncClientBuilder
    RestClients.ElasticsearchRestClientConfigurationCallback
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    ClientConfiguration.ClientConfigurationCallback to configure the RestClient client with a RestClientBuilder
